widget.empty_no_ratings: No ratings yet – be the first!
overlay.title: My Ratings
empty.watchlist: Your watchlist is empty. Add films via the bookmark button on the rating panel, or import your Letterboxd watchlist.csv.
empty.liked: No liked films yet. Tap the heart on the rating panel to like a film.
empty.diary: Your diary is empty. Rate some films or import your Letterboxd diary.csv to see rewatches show up here.
empty.recs: No recommendations yet. Rate a handful of films (especially 4-5 stars) and StarTrack will suggest new titles from genres you love.
empty.no_reviews_yet: No reviews on this server yet. Add one when you rate a film via the rating pill on a detail page.
empty.list_empty: This list is empty. Click a film on a detail page and use the "Add to list" action to populate it.
empty.no_lists: No lists on this server yet. Click "+ New list" to create one. Lists are collaborative by default — any user on your server can add films to them.
confirm.replace_favorite_film: You already have 4 favorites. Replace the oldest one with this film?
confirm.replace_type_films: You already have 4 films pinned. Replace the oldest one?
confirm.replace_type_series: You already have 4 series pinned. Replace the oldest one?
confirm.replace_type_episodes: You already have 4 episodes pinned. Replace the oldest one?
confirm.delete_list_detail: Delete the list "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.clean_dead_ratings:
Clean dead ratings?

This deletes any StarTrack rating whose underlying library item no longer has a valid file on disk (zombie entries left over from dead hard drives). Existing ratings that still resolve to a real file are untouched. This cannot be undone.
modal.no_lists_create_below: No lists yet. Create one below.
modal.collaborative_check: Collaborative — other users on this server can add films to it
letterboxd.title: Letterboxd sync
letterboxd.import_top4_title: Pull your Letterboxd Top 4 from your public profile page
letterboxd.upload_hint: Download your data from letterboxd.com → Settings → Import & Export, then drop the ZIP here.
letterboxd.import_full_history_hint: Export your data from letterboxd.com → Settings → Import & Export, then drop the .zip file here (or the ratings.csv from inside).
letterboxd.nothing_new: Nothing new on Letterboxd right now.
letterboxd.small_import_summary: Imported {imported} new, updated {updated}. {unmatched} not in library, {ambiguous} ambiguous.
letterboxd.no_favorites_found: No favorites found on your profile, or none of them matched your library.
letterboxd.favorites_set_one: Set {n} favorite from your Letterboxd profile.
letterboxd.favorites_set_many: Set {n} favorites from your Letterboxd profile.
letterboxd.cleanup_removed_one: Cleaned up {rows} rating across {items} dead item (out of {total} rated items).
letterboxd.cleanup_removed_many: Cleaned up {rows} ratings across {items} dead items (out of {total} rated items).
letterboxd.cleanup_none: No dead ratings found. All {total} rated items resolve to living library entries.
letterboxd.diag_failed: Diagnose failed — check server logs for StarTrack errors.
letterboxd.diag_zombies_one: Filtered out {n} zombie item with missing files (dead drive leftovers).
letterboxd.diag_zombies_many: Filtered out {n} zombie items with missing files (dead drive leftovers).
letterboxd.diag_unique: {unique} unique normalized titles ({dup} duplicate copies remain).
letterboxd.diag_zero_movies: The library query is returning zero movies — StarTrack cannot see your library. Check that your library folders have the "Movies" content type and a completed scan.
admin.description: Community star ratings for movies and TV shows, stored privately on your server.
admin.widget_status_body: The StarTrack widget is automatically active for all users on this server, including mobile. No browser extensions or manual steps required — just navigate to any Movie or TV Show and the pill will appear.
admin.widget_status_footnote: If you don't see the widget after restarting Jellyfin, check the server logs for [StarTrack] messages.
admin.letterboxd_intro: Every user on this server can now sync their Letterboxd ratings into StarTrack. Click the gear icon inside the StarTrack rating panel on any movie page to open the Letterboxd settings for that user. Each user can:
admin.letterboxd_bullet_username: Enter their Letterboxd username and enable hourly auto-sync — new ratings posted to Letterboxd import themselves into StarTrack within an hour
admin.letterboxd_bullet_csv: Upload their Letterboxd CSV export (Settings → Import & Export → Export Your Data on letterboxd.com) for a one-shot full-history import
admin.letterboxd_bullet_manual: Trigger a manual sync at any time via the "Sync now" button
admin.letterboxd_footnote: StarTrack matches Letterboxd films to your library by title + year. Films not in your library are skipped and reported back on the user's sync status line. The hourly sync is a standard Jellyfin scheduled task — you can adjust its interval in Dashboard → Scheduled Tasks → StarTrack Letterboxd Sync.
admin.toggle.rate_only_in_media: Only show the Rate pill inside movie / TV detail pages
admin.toggle.rate_only_in_media_sub: Hides the floating pill on Home, Library, and search screens.
admin.toggle.hide_recent_sub: Recent shows the user most recent ratings from the rating pill.
admin.toggle.hide_letterboxd_sub: Removes the Letterboxd entry from the rating panel footer.
admin.toggle.replace_details: Replace the native rating on media detail pages with the StarTrack average
admin.toggle.replace_mediabar: Replace ratings in the Media Bar plugin with the StarTrack average
admin.toggle.show_on_posters: Overlay the StarTrack rating on media posters
admin.toggle.post_playback: Show a rating popup after a movie or episode finishes playing
admin.default_language_desc: Applied to users who have not picked their own language yet.
admin.settings_intro: Changes apply to every user on this server. Individual users can still override their own language from the globe picker inside the StarTrack rating panel.
admin.tagline: Community star ratings for movies and TV shows, stored privately on your server.
admin.support_intro: StarTrack is built and maintained in my spare time. If you find it useful, consider supporting development:
widget.community_recent_empty: No ratings on this server yet - rate something to get started.
admin.community_recent_title: Show community recent ratings instead of each user's own
admin.community_recent_sub: When enabled, the Recent pill shows the latest ratings from every user on the server with their name next to each entry.
admin.views_sub: Hide views from every user. The Media (films) view is always available and cannot be hidden.
